title: Delicious Pork Scallion Pancake
description: A crispy and savory Chinese-inspired pancake filled with pork and scallions.
instructions: 1. In a large bowl, combine flour, salt, and 1/4 cup of warm water. Mix until a dough forms.
2. Knead the dough for 5 minutes until it becomes smooth.
3. Divide the dough into 4 equal pieces.
4. Roll out each piece into a thin circle.
5. Heat a non-stick pan over medium-high heat.
6. Brush the pan with vegetable oil.
7. Place a dough circle in the pan and cook for 2 minutes on the first side.
8. Flip the pancake and cook for another 2 minutes.
9. Repeat with the remaining dough circles.
10. In a bowl, mix together ground pork, scallions, soy sauce, sugar, and cornstarch.
11. Place 1 tablespoon of the pork mixture onto one half of a pancake.
12. Fold the other half over the filling and press the edges to seal.
13. Cook the pancake for an additional 2-3 minutes on the first side, until the filling is cooked through.
